rows.label: qev060902_MSG0001
rows.name:
...What's with you? Are you
trying to say this obviously
suspicious alien is innocent?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060902_SEL0011
rows.name:
Persuade her that Shiraton
is not the culprit.

rows.label: qev060902_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060902_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask for details about the incident.

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0002
rows.name:
Caring about your friends is all well
and good, but I can't just declare
him innocent without any evidence![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Eh? You're asking if I have
evidence that he is the culprit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0004
rows.name:
My intuition is the evidence! A
detective's intuition, you know?
It was tingling like crazy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0005
rows.name: ...Oh, playing detective, are we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0006
rows.name:
But I like that attitude of trying
to uncover the truth. So I'll make
a special exception and tell you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0007
rows.name:
Late at night, the culprit broke a window
glass and infiltrated a certain mansion in
the high-class residential area just up ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0008
rows.name:
The culprit obtained the jewel without
being noticed by the sleeping residents.
But on the way back, he messed up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0009
rows.name:
It seems he stepped on the tail of a
sleeping dog, and the dog, noticing
the intruder, started barking loudly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0010
rows.name:
The residents of the house, awakened
by the barking, contacted Companion,
and I rushed here immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0011
rows.name:
And then, this guy was just wandering
around a place like this wearing a mask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0012
rows.name:
...See? Suspicious, right? I'm absolutely
certain this alien is the culprit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_JNK0030
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060902_SEL0031
rows.name:
Persuade her that Shiraton
is not the culprit.

rows.label: qev060902_JNK0040
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060902_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that the culprit might
indeed be Shiraton.

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0013
rows.name:
Caring about your friends is all well
and good, but I can't just declare
him innocent without any evidence![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Eh? You're saying there was
no point in that story pointing
to him being the culprit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0015
rows.name:
And conversely, you want me to show
you evidence that he is the culprit?
Evidence... evidence... hmmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0016
rows.name:
Argh! My intuition is the evidence!
A detective's intuition, you know?
It was tingling like crazy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0017
rows.name:
...What? Are you doubting me? During my time on Earth,
I made a name for myself all over New York as a highly
capable detective, you know? So there's no mistake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0018
rows.name: ...Eh!? Why!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0019
rows.name: ...Ehh!? S-... somehow!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0020
rows.name:
How could this be... Were you
also the same type of Earthling
as this person named Tracy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well now, someone who can testify that
you are the culprit has appeared![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0022
rows.name:
You have nowhere to run! Quietly
admit that you're the culprit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0023
rows.name:
Um... please wait! The shock just now
reminded me of something. Come to think of
it, around the time the robbery occurred...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0024
rows.name:
I saw a suspicious car speeding out of
NLA's East Gate at a breakneck pace![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0025
rows.name:
That car rushed off with such momentum
that it seemed like it was heading all
the way to the Valley of Oblivion...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0026
rows.name:
Please, I beg you, just
investigate that one last thing!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0027
rows.name:
I'm not angry that you betrayed me...
so please give me one last chance...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0028
rows.name:
Phew... She just won't
listen to reason...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0029
rows.name:
At this rate, it seems the only
way to persuade her is to actually
find the real culprit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060902_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask if he didn't see anyone looking
like the culprit at that time.

rows.label: qev060902_JNK0060
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev060902_SEL0061
rows.name:
Sympathize with him for
being targeted by Tracy.

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0030
rows.name:
I see... There's a possibility that
the culprit was in the same place
while I was doing my work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0031
rows.name:
You truly are sharp. You are
definitely much more suited for
this kind of work than this person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0032
rows.name:
Hmmm... A figure... A
figure... A figure...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0033
rows.name:
You truly are kind... Yes... Earthlings
are fundamentally good people...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0034
rows.name:
Even this person will surely snap out
of it if there's proper evidence that
I am not the culprit... right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0035
rows.name: Hmmm... Evidence... Evidence...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0036
rows.name:
Ah... Come to think of it, around the time
the robbery occurred... I saw a car speeding
out of NLA at a breakneck pace![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0037
rows.name:
It left from the East Gate... but
thinking about it carefully, that
car was incredibly suspicious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0038
rows.name:
Excuse me, but could you go check it out?
I believe you'll find crucial evidence
leading to the arrest of the culprit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0039
rows.name:
Are you really going to believe
his lies? Then go ahead and
make your useless effort![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Well, I think the stolen jewel
will emerge from this guy's pockets
long before then, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0041
rows.name:
Well, if it's his last request, why
not humor him? Then his futile
struggling will finally come to an end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0042
rows.name:
Heheh! When I arrest him, make
sure to testify that he's the
culprit just like before, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0043
rows.name:
It seems you made a useless
effort, but you didn't catch
the culprit anyway, did you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0044
rows.name:
What's that... wait, isn't that the
stolen jewel! Why do you have it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Eh? You found it when you
went to investigate the suspicious
car just like he said?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0046
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0047
rows.name:
I see... They probably got
taken out by native creatures
while fleeing outside...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0048
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0049
rows.name:
Heheh, that car he mentioned wasn't
actually there anyway, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0050
rows.name:
Well, thanks for your hard work! Now I'm
going to arrest this masked villain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0051
rows.name:
What's that... wait, isn't that the
stolen jewel! Why do you have it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0052
rows.name:
...Eh? You found it when you
went to investigate the suspicious
car just like he said?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0053
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0054
rows.name:
I see... They probably got
taken out by native creatures
while fleeing outside...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0055
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0056
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060902_MSG0057
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]
